basics.name: Dr Dimos Chatzinikolaou
basics.label: Adjunct Faculty, School of Business, University of Nicosia
basics.summary: Adjunct Faculty at the AACSB-accredited School of Business of the University of Nicosia and a member of the Knowledge Management, Innovation and Strategy Center (KISC). Research on international political economy, business ecosystems, entrepreneurship, and energy transitions.
